hero.slide1Desc: Diagnostics, engine repair, and preventive servicing for heavy trucks
hero.slide2Desc: Maintenance for construction machinery used in large-scale projects
hero.slide3Desc: On-site maintenance and emergency repairs anywhere in Algeria

about.title: NASMO
about.description: NASMO is a specialized maintenance company with more than 10 years of experience in servicing heavy trucks, construction engines, and industrial machinery.
about.description2: Our company works with major construction and infrastructure companies such as GCB and Cosider, providing reliable maintenance services for their fleets and equipment.
about.service1: Truck maintenance: diagnostics, engine repair, and preventive servicing
about.service2: Construction equipment: maintenance for heavy machinery on large-scale projects
about.service3: Mobile service: on-site maintenance and emergency repairs across Algeria
about.expertise: Our team of experienced technicians ensures high-quality repairs, preventive maintenance, and rapid intervention when equipment failures occur. We are committed to reliability, professionalism, and long-term partnerships with our clients.
about.coverage: NASMO's mobile technical teams can travel anywhere in Algeria to perform maintenance directly on your site.
about.devDesc: We are committed to keeping Algeria's heavy machinery running with professional, dependable maintenance services.
about.qualityDesc: Our commitment to quality and professionalism allows us to maintain the highest industry standards in heavy equipment maintenance.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: NASMO provides professional maintenance services for trucks, construction engines, and industrial vehicles

electrical.title: Truck Maintenance

equipment.title: Mobile Service

services.ctaTitle: Need maintenance for your heavy equipment?

truck-maintenance.title: Truck Maintenance
truck-maintenance.subtitle: Professional servicing for heavy trucks
truck-maintenance.longDesc: NASMO provides comprehensive truck maintenance services with over 10 years of experience. Our team of skilled technicians handles everything from engine diagnostics and mechanical repairs to preventive maintenance and complete fleet servicing. We work with major companies such as GCB and Cosider, ensuring their truck fleets remain in optimal condition.
truck-maintenance.f1d: Advanced diagnostic tools to identify and resolve engine issues quickly
truck-maintenance.f2d: Scheduled maintenance programs to prevent breakdowns
truck-maintenance.f3d: Complete repair services including transmission, brakes, and suspension
truck-maintenance.f4d: Dedicated fleet management and maintenance programs
truck-maintenance.f5d: Diagnosis and repair of truck electrical systems
truck-maintenance.f6d: Quality replacement parts for all major truck brands

construction-equipment.title: Construction Machinery
construction-equipment.subtitle: Keeping your construction equipment running
construction-equipment.longDesc: NASMO specializes in the maintenance and repair of construction machinery used in large-scale infrastructure and building projects. Our experienced technicians service excavators, bulldozers, cranes, loaders, and other heavy construction equipment. We support major construction companies across Algeria.
construction-equipment.f1d: Comprehensive engine overhaul for all types of construction machinery
construction-equipment.f2d: Inspection, repair, and maintenance of hydraulic components
construction-equipment.f3d: Regular servicing to maintain peak performance

mobile-service.title: Mobile Service
mobile-service.subtitle: On-site repairs anywhere in Algeria
mobile-service.longDesc: NASMO's mobile maintenance service brings our expertise directly to your worksite. Our fully equipped service vehicles carry the tools, diagnostic equipment, and parts needed to perform most repairs on-site. Whether you're on a remote construction site or at a fixed facility, our mobile teams can reach you anywhere in Algeria.
mobile-service.f1d: Comprehensive repair services at your worksite
mobile-service.f3d: Mobile teams ready to travel across Algeria
mobile-service.f4d: Fully equipped service vehicles with tools and parts

products.title: They Trust Us

contact.subtitle: For service requests, partnerships, or more information about our maintenance solutions, please contact us

footer.description: NASMO is a specialized maintenance company with 10+ years of experience in servicing heavy trucks, construction engines, and industrial machinery across Algeria.
